entities.name: XANTHA TERMINALIS
entities.description: A mutant phenotype in pearl millet characterized by yellow top leaves and green basal leaves appearing after internode elongation

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop Pennisetum glaucum in which the xantha terminalis mutant was identified

entities.name: LETHAL ALBINOS
entities.description: A phenotype occurring in selfed progenies of the xantha terminalis mutant due to plastid assortment

entities.name: XT
entities.description: A single recessive nuclear gene that governs the xantha terminalis trait

entities.name: BIOCHEMICAL GENETICS
entities.description: The field of study for which the xantha terminalis mutant is a useful tool

entities.name: PLASTIDS
entities.description: Organelles whose assortment during gamete formation causes lethal albinos

entities.name: INTERNODE ELONGATION
entities.description: The growth stage after which the xantha terminalis phenotype becomes visible
